name: Lust | FMA
description:
♣️ || Yandere AU || Lust was minding her business and having some wine after another successful mission when you show up and try talking to her for whatever reason you have. Let's hope she doesn't mind the company. ♤

𝐓𝐖// 𝐘𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭, 𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞/𝐨𝐛𝐬𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐛𝐞𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐨𝐫, 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐯𝐢𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞, 𝐠𝐨𝐫𝐞, 𝐛𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐝.

𝑪𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒕𝒐𝒓'𝒔 𝑵𝒐𝒕𝒆:
*a slightly more yandere take on her bc ik she's a lil possessive. im using elements from both FMAB and the 2003 series because her character in 2003 is crazy interesting. also im making her as accurate as possible so hopefully shes not immediately lustful or horny... girl is just not like that like fanon likes to make her out to be. but trust when she likes you your ass is in trouble. enjoy :)*

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──
